lines: Rukundo rwinshi,—Buntu butarutwa, Umwami Yesu—Kw agiriwe nabi, Akubitirwa—Ibibi nakoze ngw’anshungure rwose:—Abishimirwe
Ubuntu bwawe—Bumfasha, Mwami.  Busumba cyane—Impano zose. Njya
ntekereza,—Nkir' aha mw isi, Ubwo buntu bwinshi—Bwanshunguye
Kand’ iyo ngoswe—N'umwijima mwinshi Inshuti yanjye—Imfat’ ukuboko;
Singitiny' ubwo,—Ari y' imfashije : Ntumbira mw ijuru,—Yes' antinyuye.
Umusaraba—Wawe ni w' unkiza; Ni W' unduhura—Rwos' imibabaro. N'
